# Vendor Markdown References

These files are LLM-extracted Markdown references derived from the vendors specs.

They are intentionally shorter and more structured than the original PDFs so an LLM can use them as working reference material during implementation and review.

## Files

- `PSP11704.md`: product specification for Sunrise `006-0-0007` [(source)](https://rmtplusstoragesenseair.blob.core.windows.net/docs/Dev/publicerat/PSP11704.pdf)
- `TDE7318.md`: integration guidance for Sunrise and Sunlight [(source)](https://rmtplusstoragesenseair.blob.core.windows.net/docs/Market/publicerat/TDE7318.pdf)
- `TDE5531.md`: `I2C` protocol, registers, and host-side state handling [(source)](https://rmtplusstoragesenseair.blob.core.windows.net/docs/Dev/publicerat/TDE5531.pdf)
